stemHtml: During a turn with high bank angle and no altitude change, what will an aircraft experience?

options.a: Increased stress and strain due to the increased load factor.
options.b: Decreased stress and strain due to the increase of lift in the turn.
options.c: A properly maintained aircraft won't see any change in stress or strain during the turn.
options.d: Strain will increase due to the increased load factor, but stress will be unchanged.
